student_fresher.title: Student / Fresher
student_fresher.description: Fundamental concepts and hands-on basics for those starting their career.

modules.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
modules.description: Understand the building blocks of efficient software.

quizQuestions.question: What is the time complexity of a binary search?
Which data structure operates on a Last-In, First-Out (LIFO) basis?

codingChallenges.title: Reverse a Linked List
codingChallenges.description: Write a function that takes the head of a singly linked list and reverses it.

codingChallenges.title: Validate a BST
codingChallenges.description: Write a function to determine if a binary tree is a valid binary search tree.

modules.title: Databases 101
modules.description: Learn how data is stored, managed, and retrieved in modern applications.

quizQuestions.question: Which SQL statement is used to extract data from a database?
What is the primary purpose of a foreign key?

codingChallenges.title: Query Employee Data
codingChallenges.description: Given two tables, Employees and Departments, write a SQL query to find the names of all employees in the 'Sales' department.

modules.title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
modules.description: Learn the building blocks of the web, including modern layout techniques.

quizQuestions.question: Which HTML tag is used for the largest heading?
What property is used to change the background color?
How do you select an element with id 'header' in CSS?

codingChallenges.title: Build a Personal Portfolio Page
codingChallenges.description: Create a static, responsive single-page portfolio using semantic HTML and advanced CSS for layout and styling.

modules.title: JavaScript Core Concepts
modules.description: Master the language of the web, from variables to asynchronous programming.

quizQuestions.question: How do you declare a constant variable in JavaScript?
Which method is used to fetch data from a server?
What does `JSON.parse()` do?
options: Converts a JavaScript object to a JSON string
Converts a JSON string to a JavaScript object
Fetches data from a JSON file
quizQuestions.answer: Converts a JSON string to a JavaScript object

codingChallenges.title: Simple To-Do List
codingChallenges.description: Build an interactive to-do list where users can add and remove tasks. Use JavaScript to handle the logic and DOM manipulation.

codingChallenges.title: Weather App
codingChallenges.description: Create an application that fetches weather data from a public API (like OpenWeatherMap) and displays it to the user.

modules.title: Introduction to React
modules.description: Get started with the most popular frontend library for building user interfaces.

quizQuestions.question: What is JSX?
Which hook is used to manage state in a functional component?
How do you pass data from a parent component to a child component?

codingChallenges.title: Build a Counter App
codingChallenges.description: Create a simple React application with buttons to increment, decrement, and reset a counter value displayed on the screen.

modules.title: Version Control with Git
modules.description: Learn how to manage your code and collaborate with others.

quizQuestions.question: Which command saves your changes to the local repository?
What is the command to create a new branch named 'feature'?

codingChallenges.title: Collaborate on a Project
codingChallenges.description: Create a new repository on GitHub, create a 'develop' branch, make some changes, push the branch, and open a pull request to merge it into 'main'.

modules.title: Introduction to Node.js & Express
modules.description: Build your first server-side application with JavaScript.
topics: Handling Requests and Responses (JSON, query params, body)

quizQuestions.question: What is NPM?
In Express, what is middleware?
options: A function that has access to the request and response objects
quizQuestions.answer: A function that has access to the request and response objects

codingChallenges.title: Create a Simple REST API
codingChallenges.description: Build an Express server with CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) endpoints for a collection of in-memory 'posts'.

modules.title: Backend Fundamentals with Django
modules.description: Learn a powerful Python framework for rapid and secure web development.

quizQuestions.question: What does MTV stand for in Django?
Which command creates the necessary database tables for your models?

codingChallenges.title: Build a Simple Blog Backend
codingChallenges.description: Create a Django project with a 'Post' model (title, content, author, created_date). Use the Django admin to create and view posts, and create a simple view to list all posts.

modules.title: Mobile Development Landscape
modules.description: Understand the different approaches to building mobile applications.
topics: Setting up Your Development Environment (Android Studio, Xcode)

quizQuestions.question: Which approach typically offers the best performance?
What is the primary language for native Android development?

codingChallenges.title: Environment Setup
codingChallenges.description: Successfully install and configure Android Studio (with the Android emulator) and/or Xcode (with the iOS simulator).

modules.title: Introduction to Flutter
modules.description: Build beautiful, natively compiled applications from a single codebase using Dart.

quizQuestions.question: In Flutter, everything is a...
Which widget is used to place items in a vertical array?

codingChallenges.title: Build a 'Business Card' App
codingChallenges.description: Create a single-screen Flutter application that displays your name, title, and contact information using various layout widgets.

modules.title: Foundations of Data Analysis
modules.description: Learn the core concepts of statistics and the data analysis lifecycle.
topics: Descriptive Statistics (Mean, Median, Mode, Standard Deviation)

quizQuestions.question: What measure of central tendency is most affected by outliers?

codingChallenges.title: Calculate Statistics
codingChallenges.description: Given a list of numbers, manually calculate the mean, median, and mode without using a library.

modules.title: Python for Data Analysis
modules.description: Use Python libraries like Pandas and NumPy to manipulate and analyze data.

quizQuestions.question: In Pandas, what is the primary data structure?

codingChallenges.title: Analyze Sales Data
codingChallenges.description: Using Pandas, load a CSV file of sales data. Find the total revenue, average order value, and the top-selling product.

modules.title: SQL for Analysts
modules.description: Master the language for querying and managing relational databases.

quizQuestions.question: Which clause is used to filter results of an aggregate function?

codingChallenges.title: Customer Order Analysis
codingChallenges.description: Given Customers and Orders tables, write a SQL query to find the top 5 customers who have spent the most money.

modules.title: Data Visualization Basics
modules.description: Learn to tell stories with data using popular tools.
topics: Introduction to Tableau or Power BI
Basic Charting with Matplotlib and Seaborn

quizQuestions.question: Which chart is best for showing the relationship between two continuous variables?

codingChallenges.title: Create an Interactive Dashboard
codingChallenges.description: Using Tableau Public or Power BI, connect to a sample dataset and create a dashboard with at least three different charts that allow for interactive filtering.

modules.title: Linux & Shell Scripting
modules.description: Learn the fundamentals of the Linux command line and automation.

quizQuestions.question: Which command is used to change file permissions?

codingChallenges.title: Automate Backups
codingChallenges.description: Write a bash script that creates a compressed archive of a specified directory and moves it to a backup folder with a timestamp in the filename.

modules.title: Introduction to Cloud Computing
modules.description: Understand the basics of cloud services and major providers.
topics: Core Services of AWS, Azure, GCP (Compute, Storage, Networking)

quizQuestions.question: Which of these is an example of IaaS?

codingChallenges.title: Launch a Virtual Machine
codingChallenges.description: Using the free tier of AWS, GCP, or Azure, launch a simple Linux virtual machine and connect to it using SSH.

working_professional.title: Working Professional
working_professional.description: Deepen your knowledge with advanced concepts, tooling, and best practices for career growth.

modules.title: Advanced React & State Management
modules.description: Write more efficient code and manage complex application state effectively.
topics: Client-side caching with React Query / SWR

quizQuestions.question: What is the purpose of `useMemo`?
What problem does React Query primarily solve?

codingChallenges.title: Refactor a component with `useReducer`
codingChallenges.description: Take a component that uses multiple `useState` hooks for related state and refactor it to use a single `useReducer` for more organized state logic.

codingChallenges.title: Create a Custom Hook
codingChallenges.description: Create a custom hook `useFetch` that takes a URL and returns the data, loading state, and error state.

modules.title: TypeScript and Frontend Testing
modules.description: Add static typing and ensure application quality with automated tests.
topics: Unit Testing with Jest & React Testing Library

quizQuestions.question: What is the file extension for a TypeScript React component?
In React Testing Library, what is the purpose of `getByRole`?
options: To find an element by its CSS class
To find an element by its accessibility role
To find an element by its data-testid
To find an element by its text content
quizQuestions.answer: To find an element by its accessibility role

codingChallenges.title: Write a Unit Test for a Component with API call
codingChallenges.description: Create a component that fetches and displays data. Write a test that mocks the API call and verifies the component renders the 'loading', 'success', and 'error' states correctly.

modules.title: Exploring Next.js and Angular
modules.description: Explore powerful frameworks for building enterprise-level applications.
topics: Next.js: SSR, SSG, ISR, API Routes, File-based Routing
Angular: Components, Services, Modules, Dependency Injection, RxJS, Reactive Forms

quizQuestions.question: What is Static Site Generation (SSG)?
options: The page is rendered on the client
The page is rendered on the server for each request
The page is rendered at build time into static HTML
quizQuestions.answer: The page is rendered at build time into static HTML

quizQuestions.question: What is a primary use case for RxJS in Angular?
options: Managing asynchronous events and data streams
quizQuestions.answer: Managing asynchronous events and data streams

codingChallenges.title: Build a blog with Next.js
codingChallenges.description: Create a simple blog using Next.js where posts are pre-rendered at build time (SSG) from markdown files. Include dynamic routes for individual blog posts.

modules.title: Authentication, Authorization & Docker
modules.description: Implement security and package your applications into portable containers.

quizQuestions.question: What is a Docker image?
options: A running instance of a container
A lightweight, standalone, executable package template
quizQuestions.answer: A lightweight, standalone, executable package template

quizQuestions.question: What is a major benefit of using JWTs?
options: They are stored in the database
They are stateless and contain self-contained claims
They can only be used with cookies
quizQuestions.answer: They are stateless and contain self-contained claims

codingChallenges.title: Dockerize a Fullstack App
codingChallenges.description: Take a Node.js/Express backend and a React frontend and write a Docker Compose file to build and run both services, connecting them via a network.

modules.title: Advanced API Development
modules.description: Build more robust and efficient APIs with advanced techniques.
topics: Using an ORM/ODM effectively (Prisma, Mongoose, Django ORM)

quizQuestions.question: What problem does GraphQL aim to solve?

codingChallenges.title: Implement Pagination
codingChallenges.description: Add pagination to an existing API endpoint that returns a list of items. It should accept 'page' and 'limit' query parameters.

modules.title: CI/CD Implementation
modules.description: Automate your build, test, and deployment pipelines.

quizQuestions.question: What does 'CI' stand for in CI/CD?

codingChallenges.title: Build a CI Pipeline
codingChallenges.description: Using GitHub Actions, create a workflow that triggers on a push to the main branch, installs dependencies, runs tests, and builds a Node.js application.

modules.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
modules.description: Manage your infrastructure with code for consistency and repeatability.

quizQuestions.question: What is the name of the file that stores the state of your infrastructure in Terraform?

codingChallenges.title: Deploy a Web Server with Terraform
codingChallenges.description: Write a Terraform configuration to provision a virtual machine on a cloud provider and install a simple web server (like Nginx) on it.

modules.title: Introduction to Kubernetes
modules.description: Learn the fundamentals of the leading container orchestration platform.
topics: Core Objects: Pods, Services, Deployments, ReplicaSets

quizQuestions.question: In Kubernetes, what is the smallest deployable unit of computing?

codingChallenges.title: Deploy an Application on Minikube
codingChallenges.description: Using Minikube, deploy a simple web application container using a Deployment and expose it with a Service.
